roa.docketEntryComment: Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Release with Coordinated Pickup
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Prior to Release
Order - Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Terminated

/CAL: STATUS/DAWT/X: REPORT RECEIVED REFLECTS THAT DEFENDANT IS PROGRAM COMPLIANT AT JERRICHO HOUSE,/X: COUNSEL SPOKE TO JUDGE DARWIN & A NEW ORDERWAS SIGNED & FILED TODAY/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO CONTINUE PARTICIPATION IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM (JERICHO PROJECT)/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONT/DOPU: IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X: DEFENDANT RECEIVED APPROVAL FROM THE JERRICHO PROJECT FACILITIES & ASSERTIVE CASE MANAGEMENT WILL BRING DEFENDANTTO THIS TREATMENT FACILITY,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANTSHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BERELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REMAIN WITHIN THE INTERIOR PREMISES OF JERRICHO PROJECT FACILITIES UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE & MUST REMAININ RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AT ALL TIMES/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1: EDMUND WONG & WEI DAO/SA2: 3958 CESAR CHAVEZ ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/STWPX/VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 02-23-22/CONTD: STATUS/DOPU: IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/

/CAL: PLACEMENT & PROGRAM STATUS/INTC/30    CACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER ISREFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/LDPX: 02-28-22(60)/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING IN DEPT 20 ON 01-31-22/DOP/TE: 3HOURS/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 02-03-22/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IS VACATED BY MUTUAL REQUEST OF THE PARTIES,/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL INDICATES AUTHORIZATION TO WAIVETHE 10TH DAY IN THIS CASE ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT,/NT260/LDPX:02-28-22//TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 12/TRANS 12:FORTHWITH TO JOIN OTHER CASES/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:PAUL DENNISON/X:CHERYL RICH IS SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PAUL DENNISON/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:01-14-22 (10TH DAY)/X:THE COURT FINDS BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT RELEASING THE DEFENDANT OR LESS RESTRICTIVE ALTERNATIVES TO INCARCERATION WOULD NOT/X:REASONABLY PROTECT THE PUBLIC OR THE VICTIM/X:THE COURT MAKES FURTHER FACTUAL FINDINGS ON THE RECORD,/SHER/NB/SA2:95 CRESENT AVE, & 3958 CESAR CHAVEZ AVE, BOTH IN SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:3 HOURS/DOP/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWT/CONT/DOPU: DEFENDANT IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,/
/CAL: POSSIBLE DISPOSITION/DAWT/X: DEFENDANT IN JERICHO PROJECT,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOPU: DEFENDANT IN JERICHO PROJECT,/
/CAL: STATUS/DAWT/CONTD: STATUS AND POSSIBLE DISPOSITION/DOPU: DEFENDANT IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,/
/CAL: PLACEMENT & PROGRAM STATUS/DAWT/X: DEFENDANT IS STILL WAITING FOR ABED,/CONT/DOP/
